name: Tomato-Leek Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut all but 2 lb of tomatoes into quarters.
2. With parsley, process until well pureed.
3. Dice the remaining tomatoes and set aside.
4. Slice the white part of the leek into 1/4-inch slices.
5. Chop the tender green leaves.
6. Discard all but a few of the tougher leaf parts.
7. Wash the leeks carefully.
8. Place the leeks in a large pot with the reserved green leaves, garlic, and olive oil.
9. Cover with 3 cups stock. Bring to a boil, then lower heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
10. Add the pureed and diced tomatoes.
11. Add the remaining ingredients.
12. Simmer on low heat for 20 to 25 minutes.
13. Chill and serve.
